notes: the destination — lean bulk is the vehicle. Adam's bet: 6 months. Pace: e1RM 204 by Aug 25, 210 by Oct 1, 215 by Nov 1, 219 by Dec 1, 223 by Jan 1. The risk window is Oct-Dec (historical layoff season).

instrumental to bench-225; keep lean (~0.5 lb/wk = 0.30% BW/wk). Macro split (Iraki 2019 + Morton 2018): ~2980 kcal (TDEE+250), protein 150-155g (2.0 g/kg) in 4 feedings of 31-42g incl. post-training and pre-sleep, fat ~75g (1.0 g/kg), carbs ~420g (5.5 g/kg), fiber ~40g. Creatine 5g/day (label-check for allergens). kcal target auto-corrects via health_nutrition once empirical.
